title: Shower Door Seal Strip for 4-6mm Glass - Covers up to 20mm Gap - Perfect Transparent Shower Screen Seal Replacement with 90cm Adjustable Length (Straight)
features: 【 Universal Compatibility 】- Easy to cut and easy to fit shower screen seal strip that fits perfectly with 4-6mm glass and requires no tools which means your bathroom will look clean and dry even after a long shower
【 Customisable Length 】- 90cm extra long shower seal strip which can easily be adjusted with the majority of the shower doors, not leaving you hanging with a half-covered door

【 Prevents Water Leakage 】- Our shower door seal replacement is soft and flexible, so it easily covers up to a 20mm gap even if your gap is lesser than expected, the seal will simply bend and block the water from going out

【 Premium Quality 】- Our glass shower door seal strip is made using high-quality transparent and flexible PVC material that does not turn yellow or get discoloured easily, which means you do not need to buy another strip after every few weeks
【 Quick Installation 】- Give the shower glass seal strip a 5-minute soak in the warm water to easily flex, slide and adjust it according to the thickness of the door without any difficulty
【 Tested Quality 】- Our shower screen seal has earned a quality seal from a leading European testing company, ensuring top-notch reliability and effectiveness
